ddls:
CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey response */,
  "main_branch" TEXT /* Main professional role of the respondent */,
  "employment" TEXT /* Type of employment of the respondent */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "us_state" TEXT /* State in the USA, if applicable */,
  "uk_country" TEXT /* Country in the UK, if applicable */,
  "ed_level" TEXT /* Highest educational level attained */,
  "age_first_code" TEXT /* Age when the respondent first learned to code */,
  "learn_code" TEXT /* Method(s) used to learn coding */,
  "years_code" INTEGER /* Total years of coding experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the response as active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the skill record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this skill belongs to */,
  "language_have_worked_with" TEXT /* Programming languages the respondent has experience with */,
  "language_want_to_work_with" TEXT /* Programming languages the respondent wants to learn */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the respondent in the language */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the database record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this database belongs to */,
  "database_have_worked_with" TEXT /* Databases the respondent has experience with */,
  "database_want_to_work_with" TEXT /* Databases the respondent wants to learn */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the platform record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this platform belongs to */,
  "platform_have_worked_with" TEXT /* Platforms the respondent has worked with */,
  "platform_want_to_work_with" TEXT /* Platforms the respondent wants to work with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platforms_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_frameworks" (
  "webframe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the web framework record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this web framework belongs to */,
  "webframe_have_worked_with" TEXT /* Web frameworks the respondent has experience with */,
  "webframe_want_to_work_with" TEXT /* Web frameworks the respondent wants to learn */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the web framework */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("webframe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_frameworks_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "misc_tech" (
  "misc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the miscellaneous tech record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this tech belongs to */,
  "misc_tech_have_worked_with" TEXT /* Miscellaneous technologies the respondent has experience with */,
  "misc_tech_want_to_work_with" TEXT /* Miscellaneous technologies the respondent wants to learn */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("misc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_misc_tech_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tools record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this tool belongs to */,
  "tools_have_worked_with" TEXT /* Tools the respondent has experience with */,
  "tools_want_to_work_with" TEXT /* Tools the respondent wants to learn */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tools_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collab_tools" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the collaboration tool record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this tool belongs to */,
  "new_collab_tools_have_worked_with" TEXT /* Collaboration tools the respondent has experience with */,
  "new_collab_tools_want_to_work_with" TEXT /* Collaboration tools the respondent wants to learn */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the collaboration tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collab_tools_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this demographic belongs to */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age range of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "trans" TEXT /* Transgender status of the respondent */,
  "sexuality" TEXT /* Sexual orientation of the respondent */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility needs of the respondent */,
  "mental_health" TEXT /* Mental health status of the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the respondent */,
  "job_satisfaction" TEXT /* Job satisfaction of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the challenge record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this challenge belongs to */,
  "challenge" TEXT /* Challenges faced by the respondent */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recommendation record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  "area_for_improvement" TEXT /* Area for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_versions" (
  "survey_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey version record */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the survey */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the survey version */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the survey version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_versions" (
  "response_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the response version record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this version belongs to */,
  "survey_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey version this response belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_versions_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_versions_survey_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_version_id") REFERENCES survey_versions ("survey_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user record */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
